_meta.resume_note: Negative result audited against the complete Degrees and Certificates section in Feather River College's official 2025-2026 catalog.

none_found_sources.locator: Catalog pages 67-131, Degrees and Certificates; page 86 lists only Economics - Certificate of Specialization

notes: No general Economics AA-T, AS-T, AA, or AS appears in the complete 2025-2026 Degrees and Certificates section. The catalog offers an Economics Certificate of Specialization consisting of ECON C2002 and ECON C2001 (page 86), but certificates are explicitly outside the requested scope.
